pdf.js (pdfjs-dist) — vendored
==============================
Upstream:   https://github.com/mozilla/pdf.js
Package:    https://www.npmjs.com/package/pdfjs-dist
Version:    6.0.227
Source URL: https://registry.npmjs.org/pdfjs-dist/-/pdfjs-dist-6.0.227.tgz
Reviewed:   2026-06-19
License:    Apache-2.0 (see LICENSE in the upstream package)

Why vendored
------------
peerd reads PDFs the agent encounters in a tab (the read_pdf runner tool,
peerd-runtime/tools/defs/read-pdf.js). pdf.js is Mozilla's browser-native
PDF engine; its text layer extraction is the DEFAULT, always-available
reader (no download). Extraction runs in the OFFSCREEN document
(offscreen/pdf-extract.js) — pdf.js needs a Worker, which a service worker
cannot host. The heavier OCR path for scanned PDFs is a separate, opt-in
runtime download (peerd-runtime/pdf/ocr-store.js), the Moonshine-voice
pattern.

Files committed (the npm `build/` minified ESM build)
-----------------------------------------------------
  pdf.min.mjs           — the main API (getDocument, getTextContent, …)
  pdf.worker.min.mjs    — the parser worker; loaded via GlobalWorkerOptions
                          .workerSrc as an extension URL ('self' under the
                          offscreen CSP). Module worker (type:'module').

We commit ONLY these two minified files (mirrors moonshine-js: the runtime
JS is committed, large optional assets are not). The .map files, the
unminified builds, pdf.sandbox.* (form-scripting; unused), the viewer, and
the cmaps/standard_fonts asset dirs are intentionally omitted — text
extraction needs none of them. CJK cmaps / non-embedded standard fonts are
a known follow-up if a PDF needs them (getDocument cMapUrl/standardFontDataUrl).

Subresource Integrity (SHA-384, as committed)
---------------------------------------------
  pdf.min.mjs         sha384-lBfr/FNW1mXKELYviKVk014iBHkr5qVisfo70s4UlFayazfihJ53HIsFh+haYlPV
  pdf.worker.min.mjs  sha384-BINwIY89cgeAzLWGw817ZEBG52TiK/0x8q453MGZowyzHvxL/sYlC5V34FcZR8vy

SHA-256 (as committed)
----------------------
  pdf.min.mjs         71ab6d3ace0b285cc1feaf88f943b84238bf875f7a005674ac448a78940913bd
  pdf.worker.min.mjs  9e3b3b7da0760e8468f4b20490cceab481a96b700803a96c46b0bb00d2e3741e

Upstream tarball SHA-256
------------------------
  pdfjs-dist-6.0.227.tgz  b627567486f3738b17794c3e0bf455849aa4770e7e326e2ee7b501392ffd32d6

Modification: none. Files are the upstream build/ outputs verbatim.

Update procedure
----------------
  1. Pick the target version V from https://registry.npmjs.org/pdfjs-dist
  2. curl -sSL "https://registry.npmjs.org/pdfjs-dist/-/pdfjs-dist-V.tgz" -o pdfjs.tgz
  3. tar -xzf pdfjs.tgz
  4. cp package/build/pdf.min.mjs package/build/pdf.worker.min.mjs \
       extension/vendor/pdfjs/
  5. Recompute SHA-384/256 and paste them above:
       openssl dgst -sha384 -binary FILE | openssl base64 -A
  6. Update the Version / Source URL / tarball SHA lines.
  7. Smoke-test read_pdf on a born-digital PDF and a scanned one.
